snippet.title: The Battles : Jithendra V Lakshitha | Siri Sangabodhi |  Ahankara Nagare | The Voice Sri Lanka
snippet.description:
The Battles : A R Jithendra V Lakshitha Mihiran | Mashup | Siri Sangabodhi Maligawedi | Ahankara Nagare  | The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice One of the most successful reality TV formats in the world. Extremely successful in 180 countries. 
SRI LANKAвҖҷS NEWEST TELEVISION EXPERIENCE - The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice is an international reality television singing competition franchise of Dutch origin. It is based on the reality singing competition The Voice of Holland, which was originally created by Dutch television producer John de Mol. The show's format features five stages of competition: producers' auditions, blind auditions, battle rounds, knockouts (since 2012), and live performance shows.

A combined 438 singers have won The Voice, The Voice Kids, The Voice Teens and The Voice Senior in 145 countries/regions. Each winner is given a recording contract, a monetary prize, and a title as that nation's "Voice". 

Official Facebook Page - https://www.facebook.com/TheVoiceSriLankaOfficial
Official Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/thevoicesrilanka
Subscribe Sirasa TV on Youtube : https://bit.ly/3sCpWEz

snippet.title: The Battles : Miyuru Somarathne V Thilina Sudesh | Bol Pini Wahena Welawe | The Voice Sri Lanka
snippet.description:
The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice One of the most successful reality TV formats in the world. Extremely successful in 180 countries. 
SRI LANKAвҖҷS NEWEST TELEVISION EXPERIENCE - The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice is an international reality television singing competition franchise of Dutch origin. It is based on the reality singing competition The Voice of Holland, which was originally created by Dutch television producer John de Mol. The show's format features five stages of competition: producers' auditions, blind auditions, battle rounds, knockouts (since 2012), and live performance shows.

A combined 438 singers have won The Voice, The Voice Kids, The Voice Teens and The Voice Senior in 145 countries/regions. Each winner is given a recording contract, a monetary prize, and a title as that nation's "Voice". 

Official Facebook Page - https://www.facebook.com/TheVoiceSriLankaOfficial
Official Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/thevoicesrilanka
Subscribe Sirasa TV on Youtube : https://bit.ly/3sCpWEz

#TheVoiceSL #SirasaTV #TheVoiceSriLanka #TheVoiceSL #TheVoiceLK #VoiceSriLanka #VoiceLK #lka

snippet.description:
Shanudri Priyasad With Kavindu | а·„а·’а¶»а·” Mega Stars 3 | Round 2 | 2021-04-04
рқҗҮрқҗўрқҗ«рқҗ® рқҗҢрқҗ„рқҗҶрқҗҖрқҗ’рқҗӯрқҗҡрқҗ«рқҗ¬ рқҹ‘ | а·Ға¶ұа·”а¶Ҝа·ҠвҖҚа¶»а·’ а¶ҙа·ҠвҖҚа¶»а·’а¶әа·ға·Ҹа¶Ҝа·Ҡ а·ға¶ёа¶ҹ а¶ҡа·Җа·’а¶іа·”  а¶Ҝа·ҷа¶ҙа·…а¶§ а¶ёа¶ұа·Ҹа¶ҙа¶ә а¶ҙа·…а¶ҡа¶»а¶ұ а¶Ҷа¶ҡа·Ҹа¶»а¶ә,

HM (а·„а·’а·ға·Ҡа¶ӯа·җа¶ұа¶ҡа·Ҡ)  SP а¶Ҫа·ҷа·ғ а·ға¶іа·„а¶ұа·Ҡ а¶ҡа¶» 7766 а¶§ SMS а¶ҡа¶»а¶ұа·Ҡа¶ұ.
а¶үа¶»а·’а¶Ҝа·Ҹ а¶»а·Ҹа¶ӯа·ҠвҖҚа¶»а·“ 7.30 а·ға·’а¶§ а¶¶а¶Ҝа·Ҹа¶Ҝа·Ҹ а¶Ӣа¶Ҝа·‘а·ға¶ұ 9.00 а¶Ҝа¶ҡа·Ҡа·Җа·Ҹ а¶”а¶¶а¶§ а¶ёа¶ұа·Ҹа¶ҙа¶ә а¶ҙа·…а¶ҡа¶Ҫ а·„а·җа¶ҡ.

рқҗӮрқҗҘрқҗўрқҗңрқҗӨ рқҗЎрқҗһрқҗ«рқҗһ рқҗ…рқҗЁрқҗ« рқҗ–рқҗһрқҗӣ рқҗ•рқҗЁрқҗӯрқҗһ:https://hirumegastars.hirutv.lk/vote-battle5-team1-round2.html

рқҷҒрқҷӨрқҷЎрқҷЎрқҷӨрқҷ¬ рқҷҗрқҷЁ рқҷҠрқҷЈ рҹ‘Ү

рҹ‘ү рқҗ…рқҗҡрқҗңрқҗһрқҗӣрқҗЁрқҗЁрқҗӨ : https://www.facebook.com/hirutv
рҹ‘ү рқҗҲрқҗ§рқҗ¬рқҗӯрқҗҡрқҗ рқҗ«рқҗҡрқҗҰ : https://www.instagram.com/hirutvlk

snippet.title: Asku Maaro Video | Kavin, Teju Ashwini | Dharan Kumar | K. Sivaangi | Dongli Jumbo | Sandy
snippet.description:
Stream now - https://SMI.lnk.to/AskuMaaro

The rollicking music video of #AskuMAaro composed by #DharanKumar starring #Kavin , #TejuAshwini& #Sivaangi is here! This unapologetically fun and groovy song has lyrics by #KuKarthik and is all ready to make its way to your favourite Tamil Playlist and you simply cannot miss this one! 

Song - Asku Maaro
Composed by Dharan Kumar
Featuring - Kavin, Teju Ashwini
Sung by Dharan Kumar & K. Sivaangi
Lyrics - Ku. Karthik
Directed by Dongli Jumbo

snippet.title: Reacting to my 'Green Screen Challenge' videos
snippet.description:
I have asked my audience to use the green screen footage I have provided to make a funny and creative video. In this video, I am reacting to a few of those videos and choosing 3 winners, who will be awarded cases of Red Bull cans. There were 200+ entries to this competition and I am super proud of all of you for participating in it. Doesn't matter if your video was good enough or not, I appreciate the effort every one of you has put into your videos. Raspat and keep improving!
*Special thanks to Red Bull for making this possible!

**********************
Green screen entries which I react to in this video in order:
WeBaA - https://youtu.be/Qq2sf69Vzso
Sri Meme - https://youtu.be/MZQVwXRCAlA
Shimraan Mahir - https://youtu.be/NGUwOE4CfFA
JAYY - https://youtu.be/DK7UYlpCoLU
Dr. Saico - https://youtu.be/SF5gvSh_-DE
HeshanOnYoutube - https://youtu.be/cdP16jWad34
VolkaYami - https://youtu.be/eJhPK3-BPgQ
SANO - https://youtu.be/Pqq5CRM7XTM
Hirusha Ruwanka - https://youtu.be/rdggoDXU6j0
Sri Meme - https://youtu.be/-q6iGhslwlU
SP Janith Ushan - https://youtu.be/a4IZAKrjuy8
**********************

а¶Ҡа¶әа·ҡ а·ға·Җа·ғ (04) а¶ҙа·җа·Җа¶ӯа·’ а¶Ҫа·қа¶ҡ а·Җа·’а·Җа·Ҹа·„а¶ҡ а¶»а·– а¶»а·җа¶ўа·’а¶« а¶ӯа¶»а¶ҹа·Ҹа·Җа¶Ҫа·’а¶ә а·Җа·ҷа¶ұа·”а·Җа·ҷа¶ұа·Ҡ а·Җа·– а·Ға·ҠвҖҚа¶»а·“ а¶Ҫа¶Ӯа¶ҡа·Ҹ а·Җа·’а·Җа·Ҹа·„а¶ҡ а¶»а·– а¶»а·җа¶ўа·’а¶« а¶ӯа·ҡа¶»а·“а¶ёа·ҡ а¶…а·Җа·ға¶ұа·Ҡ а¶ӯа¶»а¶ҹа¶ә а¶Ӣа¶«а·”а·ға·”а¶ёа·Ҡ а¶ёа·”а·„а·”а¶«а·”а·Җа¶»а¶ҡа·Ҡ а¶ңа¶ұа·” а¶Ҫа·җа¶¶а·–а·Җа·Ҹ. а¶…а¶Ҝа·Ҹа·… а¶ӯа¶»а¶ҹа¶әа·ҡ а¶ҡа·’а¶»а·”а¶Ҫ а¶ҙа·”а·Ӯа·Ҡа¶ҙа·’а¶ҡа·Ҹ а¶Ҝ а·ға·’а¶Ҫа·Ҡа·Җа·Ҹ а¶ёа·„а¶ӯа·Ҡа¶ёа·’а¶әа¶§ а·„а·’а¶ёа·’а·Җа·– а¶…а¶ӯа¶» а¶ҡа·’а¶»а·”а¶Ҫ а¶ҙа·җа·…а¶іа·“а¶ёа¶Ҝ а¶ҙа·ҠвҖҚа¶»а¶°а·Ҹа¶ұ а¶Ҷа¶»а·Ҹа¶°а·’а¶ӯ а¶…а¶ёа·”а¶ӯа·Ҡа¶ӯа¶ұа·Ҡ а·Җа·’а·ға·’а¶ұа·Ҡ а·ға·’а¶Ҝа·” а¶ҡа¶»а¶ұа·” а¶Ҫа·җа¶¶а·”а·Җа·Ҹ.

а¶ұа¶ёа·”а¶ӯа·Ҡ а¶‘а¶ё а¶…а·Җа·ға·Ҡа¶®а·Ҹа·Җа·ҡа¶Ҝа·“ а¶…а¶Ҝа·Ҹа·… а¶ӯа·“а¶»а¶«а¶әа¶§ а·Җа·’а¶»а·”а¶Ҝа·Ҡа¶Ҝа·Җ а¶…а¶Ҝа·„а·ға·Ҡ а¶Ҝа¶ҡа·Ҡа·Җа¶ёа·’а¶ұа·Ҡ а·„а·’а¶§а¶ҙа·” а·Ға·ҠвҖҚа¶»а·“ а¶Ҫа¶Ӯа¶ҡа·Ҹ а·Җа·’а·Җа·Ҹа·„а¶ҡ а¶»а·– а¶»а·җа¶ўа·’а¶« а¶ёа·ҷа¶ұа·Ҡа¶ё а¶Ҫа·қа¶ҡ а·Җа·’а·Җа·Ҹа·„а¶ҡ а¶»а·– а¶»а·җа¶ўа·’а¶« а¶Ҝ а·Җа¶ұ а¶ҡа·җа¶»а·ңа¶Ҫа·’а¶ұа·Ҡ а¶ўа·–а¶»а·’ а¶ёа·„а¶ӯа·Ҡа¶ёа·’а¶ә а·Җа·ҡа¶Ҝа·’а¶ҡа·Ҹа·Җа¶§ а¶ҙа·җа¶ёа·’а¶« а¶ҙа·ҠвҖҚа¶»а¶ҡа·Ҹа·Ғ а¶ҡа¶Ҫа·ҡ а¶ӯа¶»а¶ҹ а¶ұа·“а¶ӯа·’ а¶»а·“а¶ӯа·’ а·Җа¶Ҫа¶§ а¶…а¶ұа·”а·Җ а¶ҡа·’а¶»а·”а·… а·„а·’а¶ёа·’а·Җа·’а¶ә а¶әа·”а¶ӯа·Ҡа¶ӯа·ҡ а·Җа·’а·Җа·Ҹа·„а¶ҡ а¶…а¶әа·ҷа¶ҡа·”а¶§ а¶ёа·’а·ға¶ҡа·Ҡ а·Җа·’а·Җа·Ҹа·„а¶әа·ҷа¶ұа·Ҡ а·Җа·ҷа¶ұа·Ҡ а·Җа·“ а¶Ҝа·’а¶ҡа·Ҡа¶ҡа·ға·Ҹа¶Ҝа·Җ а·ға·’а¶§а·’а¶ұ а¶…а¶әа·ҷа¶ҡа·”а¶§ а¶ұа·ңа·Җа¶ұ а¶¶а·Җа¶әа·’. а¶‘а¶¶а·җа·Җа·’а¶ұа·Ҡ а¶…а¶ұа·”а·Ға·–а¶»а¶ӯа·Ҹа·Җа¶ә а¶Ҝа·’а¶ұа·Ҹ а¶ңа¶ӯа·Ҡ а¶ӯа¶»а¶ҹа¶ҡа·Ҹа¶»а·’а¶әа¶§ а¶ҡа·’а¶»а·”а·… а¶Ҫа¶¶а·Ҹ а¶Ҝа·ҷа¶ұ а¶¶а·Җ а¶ҙа·Җа·ға¶ёа·’а¶ұа·Ҡ а¶Үа¶ә а·Җа·’а·ға·’а¶ұа·Ҡ , а¶…а¶Ҝа·Ҹа¶Ҫ а¶ӯа¶»а¶ҹа¶ҡа·Ҹа¶»а·’а¶әа¶ңа·ҡ а·„а·’а·ға·ҷа·„а·’ а¶ҙа·җа·…а¶і а¶ӯа·’а¶¶а·– а¶”а¶§а·”а¶ұа·Ҡа¶ұ а¶ңа¶Ҫа·Җа¶ұа·” а¶Ҫа·җа¶¶а·–а·Җа·Ҹ.

а·Җа·’а·Җа·Ҹа·„а¶ҡ а¶»а·– а¶»а·җа¶ўа·’а¶ұ а¶ҡа·’а¶»а·”а¶Ҫ а·„а·’а¶ёа·’а·Җа·– а¶ҙа·”а·Ӯа·Ҡа¶ҙа·’а¶ҡа·Ҹ а¶‘а¶ҡа·Ҡ а¶Ҝа¶»а·” а¶ёа·Җа¶ҡа·Ҡ а·Җа¶ұ а¶…а¶ӯа¶» а¶Үа¶ә а¶Ҝа·’а¶ҡа·Ҡа¶ҡа·ға·Ҹа¶Ҝ а·Җа·“ а·ға·’а¶§а·’а¶ұ а¶¶а·Җа¶§а¶әа·’ а¶ӯа·ңа¶»а¶ӯа·”а¶»а·” а·Җа·Ҹа¶»а·Ҡа¶ӯа·Ҹ а·Җа¶ұа·Ҡа¶ұа·ҡ. а¶ҡа·ҷа·ға·ҡ а¶ұа¶ёа·”а¶ӯа·Ҡ а¶ёа·ҷа·Җа·җа¶ұа·’ а·ға·’а¶Ҝа·”а·Җа·“а¶ёа·Ҡ а·„а¶»а·„а·Ҹ а¶Ҫа¶Ӯа¶ҡа·Ҹа·Җа·ҡ Mrs. Sri Lanka а¶ӯа¶»а¶ҹа¶ә а¶Ҫа·қа¶ҡа·ҷа¶§а¶ё а·Җа·’а·„а·’а¶Ҫа·” а·ға¶ҙа¶әа¶ұ а¶¶а·Җа¶§а¶әа·’ а¶ҡа·Ҡа·Ӯа·ҡа¶ӯа·ҠвҖҚа¶»а¶әа·ҡ а¶¶а·ңа·„а·қ а¶Ҝа·ҷа¶ұа·Ҹ а¶…а¶Ҝа·„а·ға·Ҡ а¶ҙа·…а¶ҡа¶»а¶ұа·Ҡа¶ұа·ҡ, а¶ёа·ҷа·Җа¶ұа·Ҡ а¶ўа·Ҹа¶ӯа·’а¶ҡ а¶ёа¶§а·Ҡа¶§а¶ёа·ҡ а¶ӯа¶»а¶ң а·ға¶Ӯа·Җа·’а¶°а·Ҹа¶ұа¶ә а¶ҡа·’а¶»а·“а¶ёа·ҡа¶Ҝа·“ а·ға¶Ӯа·Җа·’а¶°а·Ҹа¶әа¶ҡ а¶ёа¶«а·Ҡа¶©а¶Ҫа¶ә а·ға·„ а·Җа·’а¶ұа·’а·ға·”а¶»а·”а·Җа¶ұа·Ҡ а·Җа¶©а·Ҹа¶ӯа·Ҡ а·Җа¶ңа¶ҡа·“а¶ёа¶ҡа·’а¶ұа·Ҡ а¶әа·”а¶ӯа·”а·Җ а·„а·җа·ға·’а¶»а·’а¶ә а¶әа·”а¶ӯа·” а¶¶а·Җа¶әа·’ а¶¶а·ңа·„а·қ а¶Ҝа·ҷа¶ұа·Ҹ а¶…а¶Ҝа·„а·ға·Ҡ а¶ҙа·…а¶ҡа¶»а¶ұа·Ҡа¶ұа·ҡ.

localized.title: Caroline Jurie а·ға·„ Pushpika а¶…а¶ӯа¶» а¶Үа¶ӯа·’а·Җа·– Mrs. Sri Lanka а·Җа¶Ҫа·’а¶ә !!!
localized.description:
#NoizeNews #SriLanka #MrsWorld 

Chula | Caroline Jurie а·ға·„ Pushpika а¶…а¶ӯа¶» а¶Үа¶ӯа·’а·Җа·– Mrs. Sri Lanka а·Җа¶Ҫа·’а¶ә !!!

а¶Ҡа¶әа·ҡ а·ға·Җа·ғ (04) а¶ҙа·җа·Җа¶ӯа·’ а¶Ҫа·қа¶ҡ а·Җа·’а·Җа·Ҹа·„а¶ҡ а¶»а·– а¶»а·җа¶ўа·’а¶« а¶ӯа¶»а¶ҹа·Ҹа·Җа¶Ҫа·’а¶ә а·Җа·ҷа¶ұа·”а·Җа·ҷа¶ұа·Ҡ а·Җа·– а·Ға·ҠвҖҚа¶»а·“ а¶Ҫа¶Ӯа¶ҡа·Ҹ а·Җа·’а·Җа·Ҹа·„а¶ҡ а¶»а·– а¶»а·җа¶ўа·’а¶« а¶ӯа·ҡа¶»а·“а¶ёа·ҡ а¶…а·Җа·ға¶ұа·Ҡ а¶ӯа¶»а¶ҹа¶ә а¶Ӣа¶«а·”а·ға·”а¶ёа·Ҡ а¶ёа·”а·„а·”а¶«а·”а·Җа¶»а¶ҡа·Ҡ а¶ңа¶ұа·” а¶Ҫа·җа¶¶а·–а·Җа·Ҹ. а¶…а¶Ҝа·Ҹа·… а¶ӯа¶»а¶ҹа¶әа·ҡ а¶ҡа·’а¶»а·”а¶Ҫ а¶ҙа·”а·Ӯа·Ҡа¶ҙа·’а¶ҡа·Ҹ а¶Ҝ а·ға·’а¶Ҫа·Ҡа·Җа·Ҹ а¶ёа·„а¶ӯа·Ҡа¶ёа·’а¶әа¶§ а·„а·’а¶ёа·’а·Җа·– а¶…а¶ӯа¶» а¶ҡа·’а¶»а·”а¶Ҫ а¶ҙа·җа·…а¶іа·“а¶ёа¶Ҝ а¶ҙа·ҠвҖҚа¶»а¶°а·Ҹа¶ұ а¶Ҷа¶»а·Ҹа¶°а·’а¶ӯ а¶…а¶ёа·”а¶ӯа·Ҡа¶ӯа¶ұа·Ҡ а·Җа·’а·ға·’а¶ұа·Ҡ а·ға·’а¶Ҝа·” а¶ҡа¶»а¶ұа·” а¶Ҫа·җа¶¶а·”а·Җа·Ҹ.

а¶ұа¶ёа·”а¶ӯа·Ҡ а¶‘а¶ё а¶…а·Җа·ға·Ҡа¶®а·Ҹа·Җа·ҡа¶Ҝа·“ а¶…а¶Ҝа·Ҹа·… а¶ӯа·“а¶»а¶«а¶әа¶§ а·Җа·’а¶»а·”а¶Ҝа·Ҡа¶Ҝа·Җ а¶…а¶Ҝа·„а·ға·Ҡ а¶Ҝа¶ҡа·Ҡа·Җа¶ёа·’а¶ұа·Ҡ а·„а·’а¶§а¶ҙа·” а·Ға·ҠвҖҚа¶»а·“ а¶Ҫа¶Ӯа¶ҡа·Ҹ а·Җа·’а·Җа·Ҹа·„а¶ҡ а¶»а·– а¶»а·җа¶ўа·’а¶« а¶ёа·ҷа¶ұа·Ҡа¶ё а¶Ҫа·қа¶ҡ а·Җа·’а·Җа·Ҹа·„а¶ҡ а¶»а·– а¶»а·җа¶ўа·’а¶« а¶Ҝ а·Җа¶ұ а¶ҡа·җа¶»а·ңа¶Ҫа·’а¶ұа·Ҡ а¶ўа·–а¶»а·’ а¶ёа·„а¶ӯа·Ҡа¶ёа·’а¶ә а·Җа·ҡа¶Ҝа·’а¶ҡа·Ҹа·Җа¶§ а¶ҙа·җа¶ёа·’а¶« а¶ҙа·ҠвҖҚа¶»а¶ҡа·Ҹа·Ғ а¶ҡа¶Ҫа·ҡ а¶ӯа¶»а¶ҹ а¶ұа·“а¶ӯа·’ а¶»а·“а¶ӯа·’ а·Җа¶Ҫа¶§ а¶…а¶ұа·”а·Җ а¶ҡа·’а¶»а·”а·… а·„а·’а¶ёа·’а·Җа·’а¶ә а¶әа·”а¶ӯа·Ҡа¶ӯа·ҡ а·Җа·’а·Җа·Ҹа·„а¶ҡ а¶…а¶әа·ҷа¶ҡа·”а¶§ а¶ёа·’а·ға¶ҡа·Ҡ а·Җа·’а·Җа·Ҹа·„а¶әа·ҷа¶ұа·Ҡ а·Җа·ҷа¶ұа·Ҡ а·Җа·“ а¶Ҝа·’а¶ҡа·Ҡа¶ҡа·ға·Ҹа¶Ҝа·Җ а·ға·’а¶§а·’а¶ұ а¶…а¶әа·ҷа¶ҡа·”а¶§ а¶ұа·ңа·Җа¶ұ а¶¶а·Җа¶әа·’. а¶‘а¶¶а·җа·Җа·’а¶ұа·Ҡ а¶…а¶ұа·”а·Ға·–а¶»а¶ӯа·Ҹа·Җа¶ә а¶Ҝа·’а¶ұа·Ҹ а¶ңа¶ӯа·Ҡ а¶ӯа¶»а¶ҹа¶ҡа·Ҹа¶»а·’а¶әа¶§ а¶ҡа·’а¶»а·”а·… а¶Ҫа¶¶а·Ҹ а¶Ҝа·ҷа¶ұ а¶¶а·Җ а¶ҙа·Җа·ға¶ёа·’а¶ұа·Ҡ а¶Үа¶ә а·Җа·’а·ға·’а¶ұа·Ҡ , а¶…а¶Ҝа·Ҹа¶Ҫ а¶ӯа¶»а¶ҹа¶ҡа·Ҹа¶»а·’а¶әа¶ңа·ҡ а·„а·’а·ға·ҷа·„а·’ а¶ҙа·җа·…а¶і а¶ӯа·’а¶¶а·– а¶”а¶§а·”а¶ұа·Ҡа¶ұ а¶ңа¶Ҫа·Җа¶ұа·” а¶Ҫа·җа¶¶а·–а·Җа·Ҹ.

а·Җа·’а·Җа·Ҹа·„а¶ҡ а¶»а·– а¶»а·җа¶ўа·’а¶ұ а¶ҡа·’а¶»а·”а¶Ҫ а·„а·’а¶ёа·’а·Җа·– а¶ҙа·”а·Ӯа·Ҡа¶ҙа·’а¶ҡа·Ҹ а¶‘а¶ҡа·Ҡ а¶Ҝа¶»а·” а¶ёа·Җа¶ҡа·Ҡ а·Җа¶ұ а¶…а¶ӯа¶» а¶Үа¶ә а¶Ҝа·’а¶ҡа·Ҡа¶ҡа·ға·Ҹа¶Ҝ а·Җа·“ а·ға·’а¶§а·’а¶ұ а¶¶а·Җа¶§а¶әа·’ а¶ӯа·ңа¶»а¶ӯа·”а¶»а·” а·Җа·Ҹа¶»а·Ҡа¶ӯа·Ҹ а·Җа¶ұа·Ҡа¶ұа·ҡ. а¶ҡа·ҷа·ға·ҡ а¶ұа¶ёа·”а¶ӯа·Ҡ а¶ёа·ҷа·Җа·җа¶ұа·’ а·ға·’а¶Ҝа·”а·Җа·“а¶ёа·Ҡ а·„а¶»а·„а·Ҹ а¶Ҫа¶Ӯа¶ҡа·Ҹа·Җа·ҡ Mrs. Sri Lanka а¶ӯа¶»а¶ҹа¶ә а¶Ҫа·қа¶ҡа·ҷа¶§а¶ё а·Җа·’а·„а·’а¶Ҫа·” а·ға¶ҙа¶әа¶ұ а¶¶а·Җа¶§а¶әа·’ а¶ҡа·Ҡа·Ӯа·ҡа¶ӯа·ҠвҖҚа¶»а¶әа·ҡ а¶¶а·ңа·„а·қ а¶Ҝа·ҷа¶ұа·Ҹ а¶…а¶Ҝа·„а·ға·Ҡ а¶ҙа·…а¶ҡа¶»а¶ұа·Ҡа¶ұа·ҡ, а¶ёа·ҷа·Җа¶ұа·Ҡ а¶ўа·Ҹа¶ӯа·’а¶ҡ а¶ёа¶§а·Ҡа¶§а¶ёа·ҡ а¶ӯа¶»а¶ң а·ға¶Ӯа·Җа·’а¶°а·Ҹа¶ұа¶ә а¶ҡа·’а¶»а·“а¶ёа·ҡа¶Ҝа·“ а·ға¶Ӯа·Җа·’а¶°а·Ҹа¶әа¶ҡ а¶ёа¶«а·Ҡа¶©а¶Ҫа¶ә а·ға·„ а·Җа·’а¶ұа·’а·ға·”а¶»а·”а·Җа¶ұа·Ҡ а·Җа¶©а·Ҹа¶ӯа·Ҡ а·Җа¶ңа¶ҡа·“а¶ёа¶ҡа·’а¶ұа·Ҡ а¶әа·”а¶ӯа·”а·Җ а·„а·җа·ға·’а¶»а·’а¶ә а¶әа·”а¶ӯа·” а¶¶а·Җа¶әа·’ а¶¶а·ңа·„а·қ а¶Ҝа·ҷа¶ұа·Ҹ а¶…а¶Ҝа·„а·ға·Ҡ а¶ҙа·…а¶ҡа¶»а¶ұа·Ҡа¶ұа·ҡ.

snippet.title: Kutty Pattas Music Video | Ashwin | Reba John | Venki | Santhosh Dhayanidhi | Sandy
snippet.description:
A brilliantly vivid splash of colours and a wildly fun #KuttyPattas composed by the Raati fame #SanthoshDhayanidhi featuring the most exciting cast one could ask for! Is there a better way to head into the weekend? #Ashwin, the current darling of Tamil Television features alongside the stunningly beautiful #RebaJohn in this groovy music video directed by #Venky and choreographed by #Sandy. Watch it here and bring out the moves ! 

Stream now - https://SMI.lnk.to/KuttyPattas

snippet.title: а¶»а¶Ӯа¶ўа¶ұа·Ҡа¶§ а¶¶а¶ұа·Ҹа¶°а¶ұа·Ҹа¶ңа·Ҹа¶»а¶ә а¶ӯа·”а·…а¶Ҝа·“ а¶Ҝа¶ұа·’а·ға·Ҡ а¶ҡа·җа¶©а·ҷа¶ұа¶ӯа·”а¶»а·” а¶ҙа·„а¶»а¶Ҝа·ҷа¶әа·’
snippet.description:
https://lrnews.ch/
https://www.facebook.com/lrnews.ch/
Im D.M. Thushara Jayarathna and studied at Ananda Sastralaya, Kotte. Im working as an Investigative Web Journalist For my higher studies, I joined with Sabaragamuwa University, Management Faculty as a management student and after that I joined to Sri Lanka Law College as a Law student. I have won the Gold medal addressing Juri competition and as well as I was the Captain of Law College Debating Team. 
 
I'm the one who made complain against Mr. Namal Rajapaksha, son of former president Mr. Mahinda Rajapaksha regarding cheating the Law College Examination. After that incident, I faced political problems and life threats. Due to this reason, In the year of 2012 I left my country and currently I'm living in Switzealand. 
 
 
I dedicated my life to establish Democracy and Rule of Law of my country.

I have won the Gold medal addressing Juri competition and as well as I was the Captain of Law College Debating Team. 
 
I'm the one who made complain against Mr. Namal Rajapaksha, son of former president Mr. Mahinda Rajapaksha regarding cheating the Law College Examination. After that incident, I faced political problems and life threats. Due to this reason, In the year of 2012 I left my country and currently I'm living in Switzealand. 
 
 
I dedicated my life to establish Democracy and Rule of Law of my country.

snippet.title: Introducing Pushpa Raj | Allu Arjun | Pushpa | Rashmika | Fahadh Faasil | DSP | Sukumar
snippet.description:
Introducing Pushpa Raj on Mythri Movie Makers. Written and Directed by Sukumar. Produced by Naveen Yerneni and Y. Ravi Shankar of Mythri Movie Makers in association with Muttamsetty Media, the film stars Allu Arjun, Fahadh Faasil and Rashmika Mandanna, Dhanunjay, Rao Ramesh & Ajay Ghosh
a
The film's music is composed by Devi Sri Prasad, with cinematography and editing were performed by Miroslaw Kuba Brozek and Karthika Srinivas respectively. The film is scheduled to release on 13 August 2021, in Telugu along with dubbed versions in Malayalam, Tamil, Hindi and Kannada languages.

snippet.title: 'Mrs World' grabs crown from head of вҖҳMrs Sri LankaвҖҷ in on-stage fracas
snippet.description:
Police have arrested the reigning вҖңMrs WorldвҖқ on charges of assault over an on-stage fracas in which she pulled the crown off the head of the new вҖңMrs Sri LankaвҖқ. 

Subscribe to Guardian News on YouTube в–ә http://bit.ly/guardianwiressub

Caroline Jurie yanked the crown off Pushpika de Silva minutes after she was declared вҖңMrs Sri Lanka 2020вҖқ during a gala in Colombo on April 4. Jurie declared that Pushpika de Silva was ineligible as the winner because she was divorced, and forcibly removed her crown. De Silva needed hospital treatment after the incident, seen by stunned spectators in a packed venue as well as a live social media audience. 

To qualify for the title, contestants must be married. De Silva is estranged from her husband, but they are still legally married. The local franchise holder for the pageant, Chandimal Jayasinghe, said they were вҖңdeeply disturbed and sincerely regretвҖқ the behaviour of Jurie and the told the media the crown would be returned to De Silva 

вҖҳMrs WorldвҖҷ arrested for grabbing crown from head of вҖҳMrs Sri LankaвҖҷ в–ә https://www.theguardian.com/world/2021/apr/08/mrs-world-arrested-for-grabbing-crown-from-head-of-mrs-sri-lanka

snippet.title: The Battles : Sathisha Bhatt V Pavi Kalpani | Nagada Sang Dhol | The Voice Sri Lanka
snippet.description:
The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice One of the most successful reality TV formats in the world. Extremely successful in 180 countries. 
SRI LANKAвҖҷS NEWEST TELEVISION EXPERIENCE - The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice is an international reality television singing competition franchise of Dutch origin. It is based on the reality singing competition The Voice of Holland, which was originally created by Dutch television producer John de Mol. The show's format features five stages of competition: producers' auditions, blind auditions, battle rounds, knockouts (since 2012), and live performance shows.

A combined 438 singers have won The Voice, The Voice Kids, The Voice Teens and The Voice Senior in 145 countries/regions. Each winner is given a recording contract, a monetary prize, and a title as that nation's "Voice".

Make a peach blossom crown with silk flowers, and catch the spring breeze with my dear Granny.

жңҖиҝ‘и·ҹеҺ»е№ҙиҝҮе®Ңе№ҙдёҖж ·пјҢжҗҒе®¶йҮҢеҝҷжҳҘз§ҚжқҘзқҖгҖӮ
еӣ дёәжғіиҮӘе·ұеҒҡеҸ‘йҘ°жӢҚз…§жүҖд»ҘжңүдәҶиҝҷдёӘи§Ҷйў‘

In the mood for some hand-made hair accessories,
I made these Hanfu ornaments with silk flowers, and had this video shot.
In this pretty spring, when peach blossoms dye the mountain,
take my dear lady to the place full of memory, where all is found,
and tick yet another one from her wish list.

Please  subscribe to гҖҗжқҺеӯҗжҹ’ Liziqi гҖ‘Liziqi Channel on YouTube if you like my videos: https://goo.gl/nkjpSx 
#жқҺеӯҗжҹ’#Liziqi#lГҪtб»ӯthбәҘ#ChineseCuisine #ChineseFood
 гҖҗжқҺеӯҗжҹ’ Liziqi гҖ‘ https://goo.gl/nkjpSx
--------------------------------------------------------------------
Make a peach blossom crown with silk flowers, and catch the spring breeze with my dear Granny.

жңҖиҝ‘и·ҹеҺ»е№ҙиҝҮе®Ңе№ҙдёҖж ·пјҢжҗҒе®¶йҮҢеҝҷжҳҘз§ҚжқҘзқҖгҖӮ
еӣ дёәжғіиҮӘе·ұеҒҡеҸ‘йҘ°жӢҚз…§жүҖд»ҘжңүдәҶиҝҷдёӘи§Ҷйў‘
з”Ёзңҹдёқеёғж–ҷеҒҡдәҶдәӣвҖңз»ўиҠұвҖқе·Ҙиүәзҡ„жұүжңҚйҘ°е“Ғ
и¶ҒзқҖжҳҘиүІжӯЈеҘҪпјҢжЎғиҠұжј«еұұ
еёҰдёҠиҖҒдәәе®¶еҺ»еҘ№дёҖзӣҙжғіеҺ»зҡ„ең°ж–№еҒҡдҪңзҡ„жөӘдәҶжөӘ
дәҶдәҶеҝөжғі
As a spring ritual after the new year, IвҖҷve been busy sowing recently back at home.
In the mood for some hand-made hair accessories,
I made these Hanfu ornaments with silk flowers, and had this video shot.
In this pretty spring, when peach blossoms dye the mountain,
take my dear lady to the place full of memory, where all is found,
and tick yet another one from her wish list.
-----------------------------------------------

еӣ дёәжғіиҮӘе·ұеҒҡеҸ‘йҘ°жӢҚз…§жүҖд»ҘжңүдәҶиҝҷдёӘи§Ҷйў‘

жңҖиҝ‘гҒҜеҺ»е№ҙгҒЁеҗҢгҒҳгҖҒз§ҒгҒҜжӯЈжңҲгҒ®еҫҢгҒҜжҳҘгҒҫгҒҚгҒ«еҝҷгҒ—гҒ„гҒ§гҒҷгҖӮ
иҮӘеҲҶгҒ®жүӢдҪңгӮҠгҒ®й«ӘйЈҫгӮҠгӮ’иў«гҒЈгҒҰеҶҷзңҹгӮ’ж’®гӮҠгҒҹгҒ„гҒӢгӮүгҖҒгҒ“гҒ®еӢ•з”»гӮ’гҒ—гҒҫгҒ—гҒҹгҖӮ
гӮ·гғ«гӮҜз”ҹең°гӮ’дҪҝгҒЈгҒ§гҖҒжјўжңҚгҒ®йЈҫгӮҠгӮ’гҖҢзө№иҠұгҖҚгҒ§дҪңгӮҠгҒҫгҒ—гҒҹгҖӮ
гҒ“гҒ®гҒӢгӮҸгҒ„гӮүгҒ—гҒ„жҳҘгҒ«гҖҒжЎғгҒ®иҠұгҒҢеұұгӮ’жҹ“гӮҒгӮӢгҒЁгҒҚгҖҒ

--------------------------------------------------------------------
Haz una corona de melocotГіn con flores de seda y disfruta de la brisa primaveral con mi querida abuela

жңҖиҝ‘и·ҹеҺ»е№ҙиҝҮе®Ңе№ҙдёҖж ·пјҢжҗҒе®¶йҮҢеҝҷжҳҘз§ҚжқҘзқҖгҖӮ
еӣ дёәжғіиҮӘе·ұеҒҡеҸ‘йҘ°жӢҚз…§жүҖд»ҘжңүдәҶиҝҷдёӘи§Ҷйў‘
з”Ёзңҹдёқеёғж–ҷеҒҡдәҶдәӣвҖңз»ўиҠұвҖқе·Ҙиүәзҡ„жұүжңҚйҘ°е“Ғ
и¶ҒзқҖжҳҘиүІжӯЈеҘҪпјҢжЎғиҠұжј«еұұ
еёҰдёҠиҖҒдәәе®¶еҺ»еҘ№дёҖзӣҙжғіеҺ»зҡ„ең°ж–№еҒҡдҪңзҡ„жөӘдәҶжөӘ
дәҶдәҶеҝөжғі
Como ritual de primavera despuГ©s del aГұo nuevo, he estado sembrando recientemente en casa.
TomГ© este video porque querГӯa hacer accesorios para el cabello a mano,
Hice estos adornos de Hanfu con flores de seda e hice este video.
En esta hermosa primavera, cuando las flores de durazno tiГұen la montaГұa,
lleva a mi querida seГұora al lugar lleno de memoria, donde todo se encuentra,
y marque otro de su lista de deseos.

snippet.description:

snippet.description:

Kodiyil Oruvan is an upcoming movie that has Vijay Antony and Aathmika playing the lead roles. Directed by Ananda Krishnan and Music by Nivas K Prasanna.

snippet.title: Goodbye Old Stuff! Hammer Jam is BACK! (Clash Of Clans Official)
snippet.description:
The Hammer Jam event is back and it's the season of upgrades! Take full advantage of the 50% Home Village building cost reduction, and get ready for the first update of the year that's coming veeeery soon! рҹ‘Җ


Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter в–ә https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram в–әhttps://www.instagram.com/clashofclans 
Facebook в–әhttps://www.facebook.com/ClashofClans 

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. http://supr.cl/ThisArmy

From rage-Вӯfilled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

Chief, are you having problems? Visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/clas...

Privacy Policy:
http://www.supercell.net/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://www.supercell.net/terms-of-ser...

ParentвҖҷs Guide:
http://www.supercell.net/parents

snippet.title: Suez Canal: Tugboats sound horns as Ever Given container ship 'fully refloated'
snippet.description:
The giant container ship that has been blocking the Suez Canal was fully floated on Monday afternoon, according to the Suez Canal Authority (SCA), with footage shared online showing the vessel moving in the channel.

After hauling the fully laden 220,000-ton vessel over the canal bank, the salvage team was pulling the vessel toward the Great Bitter Lake, a wide stretch of water halfway between the north and south end of the canal, where the ship will undergo technical inspection, canal authorities said.

Satellite data from MarineTraffic.com confirmed that the ship was moving away from the shoreline toward the center of the artery.

Read more here: https://www.telegraph.co.uk/news/2021/03/29/suez-canal-ever-given-container-ship-partially-refloated/

snippet.title: Suez Canal reopens after giant stranded ship is freed - BBC News
snippet.description:
Traffic has resumed in the Suez Canal after a giant, stranded container ship blocking it for nearly a week was finally freed by salvage crews.

Tug boats honked their horns in celebration as the 400m-long (1,300ft) Ever Given was dislodged on Monday with the help of dredgers and tug boats.

Hundreds of ships are waiting to pass through the canal which links the Mediterranean to the Red Sea via Egypt.

It is one of the world's busiest trade routes.

Please subscribe HERE http://bit.ly/1rbfUog

#BBCNews
